blockerClassifications.evidence: WS-blocked context still issued 4x team_tournament_get_setup RPC in 12s. TT-6C design hides RealtimeConnectionStatus banner/chip on BTC setup when pollingFallbackActive (shouldShowRealtimeBanner + unit tests in tests/ui/team-tournament-realtime-ui.test.jsx).
blockerClassifications.fix: Harness asserts HTTP polling RPC cadence (>=2 get_setup), not visible degraded banner.

blockerClassifications.evidence: After offline→online + visibilitychange in polling-fallback context, get_setup RPC count increased 4→5. Thử lại button only renders on degraded banner (suppressed when connected healthy).
blockerClassifications.fix: Harness asserts snapshot RPC resume after network restore, not reconnect button click.

HTTP polling fallback (get_setup RPC=4, ws=1); UI banner/chip intentionally hidden on BTC setup when pollingFallbackActive (TT-6C design)
snapshot RPC resumed after network restore (4→5)
visibilitychange hidden→visible dispatched; page remained interactive
